new_findings.pattern: I thought updates were supposed to fix problems, not create new ones!
new_findings.rationale: This specific phrasing about updates creating problems does not appear in the real batch.

new_findings.pattern: I seem to lack specific guidance on this matter.
new_findings.rationale: This formal expression of confusion is unique to the synthetic batch.

new_findings.pattern: I was charged but I thought it was a trial, can u help?!?
new_findings.rationale: The casual tone and specific mention of a trial charge is not found in the real batch.
This specific mention of a recent update is not present in the real batch.
